title: calamagrostis korotkyi subsp. monticola
intro: Calamagrostis korotkyi subsp. monticola, also known as mountain fescue, is a type of grass species within the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calamagrostis korotkyi subsp. monticola include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and teas, are often used to harness its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
